# Playbook Cross-Reference

Where each concern lives across the three legal-team source artifacts, which one we treat as canonical when they overlap, and how the build script extracts it into `skills/contract_review/playbook/`.

**Sources:**
- `data/contract_review_skills/Trinetix_Contract_Playbook_2026.docx` — the playbook (90% tables).
- `data/contract_review_skills/<Type> Review Skill/SKILL.md` — per-type skill (NDA, MSA, SOW, BAA).
- `data/contract_review_skills/NDA Review Skill/references/shared_operating_rules.md` — shared role/rules/output format (identical copy in each type folder).

| Concern | Playbook | SKILL.md | References | Canonical | Bundle file |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Role | — | — | ✅ Role | references | global/role_and_golden_rules.md |
| Golden rules | — | mentioned | ✅ Golden rules | references | global/role_and_golden_rules.md |
| Risk ratings | ✅ Table 1 | mentioned | ✅ Risk ratings | **playbook** | global/risk_rating.md |
| Approval owners | ✅ Table 2 + Table 8 | mentioned | ✅ Approval owners | **playbook** | global/risk_rating.md + global/approval_matrix.md |
| Approval matrix | ✅ Table 8 | — | — | playbook only | global/approval_matrix.md |
| Core principles | ✅ Table 0 | — | — | playbook only | global/core_principles.md |
| Contract selection matrix | ✅ Table 3 | — | — | playbook only | global/contract_selection.md |
| AI Review Procedure | ✅ §10 | implicit | — | playbook | global/ai_review_procedure.md |
| Clause-bank naming | ✅ Table 9 | — | — | playbook | global/clause_bank.md |
| External-comment rules + examples | ✅ Table 10 (examples) | — | ✅ External comment rules | rules: references / examples: playbook | global/external_comments.md |
| No-Signature Gate | mentioned | ✅ section | ✅ no_signature_checklist.md | **references** | global/no_signature_checklist.md |
| Required output format | — | refers to references | ✅ Required final output format | **references** | global/output_format.md |
| Per-type Source Position | implicit | ✅ Source position | — | SKILL.md | `<type>/SKILL.md` |
| Per-type Inputs to request | — | ✅ Inputs | — | SKILL.md | `<type>/SKILL.md` |
| Per-type Clause review rules | — | ✅ Clause review rules | — | SKILL.md | `<type>/SKILL.md` |
| Per-type Clause matrix | ✅ Tables 4–7 | — | — | playbook only | `<type>/playbook_matrix.md` |
| Per-type Review workflow | mentioned in §10 | ✅ Review workflow | — | SKILL.md | `<type>/SKILL.md` |
| Per-type Quality-control checklist | — | ✅ Quality control checklist | — | SKILL.md | `<type>/SKILL.md` |
| Test prompt | — | — | ✅ test_prompt.md | references | not in bundle (used for smoke tests) |

## Reading the table

Cells with checkmarks in **multiple columns** are reconciliation points — the canonical column says which source the build script extracts from so the bundle never carries two conflicting versions of the same rule.

## Bundle assembly order

`skills/base.py::load_bundle(contract_type)` concatenates these in the order defined by `BUNDLE_ORDER`:

1. `global/role_and_golden_rules.md`
2. `global/core_principles.md`
3. `global/risk_rating.md`
4. `global/approval_matrix.md`
5. `global/output_format.md`
6. `global/ai_review_procedure.md`
7. `global/external_comments.md`
8. `global/contract_selection.md`
9. `global/clause_bank.md`
10. `<type>/SKILL.md`
11. `<type>/playbook_matrix.md`
12. `global/no_signature_checklist.md`

Order rationale: role → guiding principles → scoring vocabulary → output spec → procedure → external comments → catalogue → per-type rules → gate (read last by the model so it's the most-recent instruction before output).
